slice: Unified Build -> Publish -> Export into one canonical Published Theme: builder.js's packageTheme() now converges every Scene into the existing layouts/representations/layerPack/assets collections (convergeScenes/convergeScene/convergeSceneLayer/externalizeSceneImage), so Scene/Experience content (backgrounds, images, decorations, text) reaches Publish/the Repository/Studio for the first time; added a 5th Layer Pack target, 'overlay' (renderer/slideRenderer.js), plus scope/rect Layer fields and decoration.kind 'fill'/'image'; retired project.lastSceneBuild and its Build/Publish UI as a separate, Studio-invisible published artifact — Scene Validation stays untouched. Byte-identical for zero-Scene themes; goldenBuild.js 30/30 unchanged
